title: savignya parviflora subsp. longistyla
intro: Savignya parviflora subsp. longistyla is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical regions. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Savignya parviflora subsp. longistyla is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it can also be used topically in the form of a cream or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
